name: vynx-ui
description: Vynx UI - a token-driven UI framework for Vue Lynx (PrimeVue, for mobile).
author: Swaraj Jumde

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vynx/themes && npm run build -w @vynx/ui
scripts.build:showcase: npm run build && npm run build -w @vynx/showcase
scripts.build:starter: npm run build && npm run build -w @vynx/starter
scripts.test: node scripts/check-docs.mjs && npm run test -w @vynx/themes && npm run test -w @vynx/ui
